  sl  local_address rem_address   st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 00000000:1697 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 12345 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   1: 00000000:0BB8 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 23456 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   2: 0100007F:0035 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000     0        0 9876 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
